text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.root-cause: Author thinks requirements only move forward.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 backward / terminal transition (reject, retire, supersede).
Force owner field on every transition; reject when null.

antipattern.symptom: SLAs are present but never enforced.
antipattern.fix: Tie SLAs to a monitoring trigger; surface overdue items in T5 performance.
